query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'pbn_sites' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%domain%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'pbn_sites' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%url%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'pbn_sites' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%name%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LsDtjPqt12uZuy.1287516f661f --database 5QWxsXug7WsY3BLQHWP3Uh --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'pbn_sites' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%domain%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'pbn_sites' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%url%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'pbn_sites' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%name%');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME
name
url
username
domainAge
